report.summary: 4 new learn pages built since v5 (Hyperliquid, GPU Compute, Virtuals, Aave V4). Monad UNBLOCKED — page.tsx now exists after 5+ cycles blocked. Learn dirs at 177. FOCIL ghost still unresolved (6+ cycles). No middleware.ts file found — noindex claim needs definitive audit.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic delta vs last cycle: flat — still overnight US hours (~07:45 UTC), minimal organic volume expected
No new keyword breakouts; impressions and CTR stable across existing rankings
Top pages holding: ETH staking calc, liberation-day, exchange compare hub, DCA calc, gas tracker

CARRY-OVER INVESTIGATION: No middleware.ts file found at project root or src/. The 'middleware noindex blocks 684 pages' claim from v2-v5 needs definitive audit — either it was resolved or the blocking mechanism is elsewhere
Content velocity accelerating: 4 new pages built since v5 (~1.5h ago), 10 new pages built today total
Learn page count on disk: 177 directories (up from 173 at v5 — Hyperliquid, GPU Compute, Virtuals, Aave V4 added)
Latest publish (v3): 5 pages promoted (fee-calculator, tax-loss-harvesting, crypto-for-beginners, whale-tracker, kraken-vs-gemini). Total published: 741/1215 (61%)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since last standup (v5, ~06:10 UTC): 4 new learn pages built with page.tsx + data files

STILL BLOCKED: Zora attention-markets — no directory exists on disk

3 publish cycles completed today (publish, publish-v2, publish-v3) — 741/1215 pages now published

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1) AUDIT MIDDLEWARE CLAIM: No middleware.ts found in project. The 'noindex blocking 684 pages' issue flagged since v2 needs definitive resolution — either confirm it's fixed or locate the actual blocking mechanism. This has been the top priority for 5+ cycles without progress because the file may not exist.
2) RESOLVE GHOSTS: FOCIL guide (no dir on disk, 6+ cycles) and Zora (no dir on disk). Either scaffold them or remove from PUBLISHED_PAGES to stop 404s.
3) PROMOTE FRESH CONTENT: 4 new pages from this cycle (Hyperliquid, GPU Compute, Virtuals, Aave V4) + Monad (now unblocked) + Sanctum = 6 pages ready for PUBLISH_QUEUE promotion.
